hero.title: The next-gen ERP
hero.subtitle: for French SMEs
hero.description: Stock, billing, POS, HR, accounting. A complete suite that replaces your old scattered tools.
trust.title: They trust us
ia.title: Artificial Intelligence
ia.headline: Your invoices read, understood, recorded
ia.description: Drop a PDF. Our AI extracts lines, amounts, VAT, the supplier. One validation, and it's in your accounting.
product.title: The product
product.headline: Your entire business, at a glance
product.description: One screen for your sales, stock, invoices and cash flow. Accessible everywhere, mobile-optimized.
product.dashboard_desc: Revenue, margin, sales, cash flow: all in real-time.
product.sync_desc: A sale, an updated stock. An invoice, a ledger entry.
product.hosted_desc: TLS encryption, GDPR by design, daily backups.
features.title: A complete suite
features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing more.
features.description: Six modules designed to work together. Enable what you need, disable the rest.
module.pos_desc: POS connected to stock in real-time. Touch, fast, offline.
module.stock_desc: Stock, inventories, transfers. Barcodes and alert thresholds.
module.billing_desc: Quotes, invoices, Factur-X EN16931. One-click customer acceptance.
module.purchases_desc: Supplier orders, receipts, AI invoice import.
module.hr_desc: Anti-fraud QR code clock-in, leave, simplified payroll.
module.accounting_desc: Chart of accounts, auto entries, trial balance, FEC exports.
before_after.title: 3 hours per week. That's what you get back.
before_after.description: From paper chaos to a unified dashboard. The same work week, two different worlds.
pricing.title: Free during the launch phase
pricing.description: The entire FRECORP suite, at no cost and no commitment. Early adopters will benefit from a lifetime preferential rate when pricing is published.
pricing.period: Unlimited use during the entire beta
pricing.notice: You will be notified by email at least 30 days before pricing goes live. No automatic charges, no credit card required.
pricing.no_commitment: No commitment. You can export all your data and cancel at any time.
blog_teaser.title: The FRECORP blog
blog_teaser.description: Everything about Factur-X, the 2026 reform, and modern management.
cta.title: Take back control.
cta.description: Join the French SMEs that stopped wasting time on their invoices.
marquee.modules_count: 8 modules connected in a single tool
demo.title: Discover FRECORP in action
demo.subtitle: Explore the interface of your future ERP
demo.description: Presentation video, screenshots of each module, and a form to request a personalized demo with our team.
demo.screenshots_subtitle: Click a module to see the screenshots
demo.form_description: Our team will contact you within 24 hours to organize a demonstration tailored to your industry.
demo.form_visio_desc: Personalized presentation based on your needs
demo.form_qa_desc: Ask all your questions to our expert
demo.form_privacy: Your data is protected and will never be shared
demo.self_test_description: Create your free account and explore FRECORP with no commitment for 1 month.
roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.headline: FRECORP Roadmap
roadmap.description: Discover the evolution of FRECORP ERP. Full transparency on features being developed and those coming soon.
roadmap.idea_description: We build FRECORP with you. Share your ideas and suggestions to improve the application.
blog.title: The FRECORP Blog
blog.description: Factur-X 2026 reform, billing best practices, and ERP user guides.
cookie.title: Your cookie preferences
cookie.description: We use essential cookies for the site to function. With your consent, we may also use audience measurement cookies to improve your experience.
cookie.essential_desc: Required for operation (session, security). Always active.
cookie.analytics_desc: Anonymized usage statistics to improve the service.
